# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed.

## Reason

Explain why this change is needed.

## Scope

- [ ] Product behaviour
- [ ] UI/UX
- [ ] Architecture
- [ ] Data/storage
- [ ] Networking/platform integration
- [ ] Privacy/security
- [ ] Accessibility
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Documentation only

## Testing

Describe how this was tested.

## Privacy impact

- [ ] No privacy impact
- [ ] Stores new local data
- [ ] Requests new permission
- [ ] Sends new data remotely
- [ ] Adds diagnostics, telemetry, or analytics

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated
- [ ] Requirements updated
- [ ] Architecture updated
- [ ] Decision log updated
- [ ] Changelog updated
- [ ] Not applicable

## Checklist

- [ ] Fits Version 1 scope or is clearly marked future work.
- [ ] Preserves project principles.
- [ ] Respects platform restrictions.
- [ ] Adds no advertising, telemetry, or analytics by default.
- [ ] Commits no secrets.
